# FLAC test fixtures

These files are generated by `tool/generate_fixtures.dart` — **do not edit
them by hand**. Regenerate with:

```sh
dart run tool/generate_fixtures.dart
```

The output is deterministic, so a clean run against unchanged generator
code should produce a clean `git diff`.

## Files

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `minimal.flac` | Tiniest valid FLAC (STREAMINFO + one dummy frame). |
| `with_tags.flac` | Minimal + a VORBIS_COMMENT block with four tags. |
| `with_picture.flac` | Minimal + one VORBIS_COMMENT and one PICTURE block (tiny JPEG). |
| `with_padding.flac` | Minimal + a 4 KB PADDING block. |
| `malformed/bad_magic.flac` | Minimal file with its `fLaC` magic bytes overwritten. |
| `malformed/truncated_block.flac` | Valid STREAMINFO, then truncated mid-VORBIS_COMMENT. |

The generator reuses `buildFlac`, `makeJpeg`, and related helpers from
`test/test_fixtures.dart`, so these on-disc fixtures stay in lock-step
with the synthetic in-memory fixtures used by the rest of the test suite.
